results.title: Mohawk Industries AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Mohawk Industries has positioned itself as a leader in operational AI adoption within the manufacturing sector, leveraging advanced technologies to drive significant cost savings and efficiency improvements[1][2]. The company has implemented AI-powered fleet management systems through partnership with Samsara, achieving over $7.75M in annual savings while enhancing efficiency, safety, and compliance[3]. Mohawk's digital transformation initiatives extend to smart building technologies through their partnership with Scanalytics, integrating sensor technology into flooring systems to reduce building energy consumption by up to 35% annually[4]. The company has also adopted machine vision-based quality control systems using YOLOv5 deep-learning algorithms for automated defect detection in hardwood flooring manufacturing, improving both accuracy and production efficiency[5].
...

results.title: Master Data Coordinator - Internexxus
highlights:
# Master Data Coordinator
...
### Job Description
...
Master Data Coordinator | Mohawk Industries
...
The Tone: This is a full-time role at Mohawk Industries, located in Dalton, Georgia. Mohawk is a Fortune 500 global flooring leader, creating products that enhance residential and commercial spaces worldwide. This entry-level position contributes to our master data maintenance and governance initiatives. The role is critical in assisting with data entry, validation, and the implementation of data governance policies and procedures.
...
The TL;DR • Role: Full Time • Type: Full-time • Location: In-person, Dalton, GA
...
• Mission: This person will contribute to master data maintenance and governance initiatives by assisting with data entry, validation, and implementing data governance policies and procedures. • Tech Stack: Microsoft Office, SAP (preferred)
...
What You’ll Actually Do • Master Data Entry: Assist with master data entry, processing, validation, and maintenance activities. • Vendor Account Management: Coordinate with purchasing and suppliers to set up and maintain accurate vendor accounts, including handling sensitive information. • Data Governance Compliance: Ensure compliance with data governance standards and guidelines, implementing data quality assurance processes. • Data Integrity Monitoring: Monitor and address data quality issues to maintain data integrity and reliability. • Reporting and Analysis Support: Work with Business Intelligence and IT to ensure accurate and timely reporting and assist in enhancing data analysis capabilities specific to master data.
...
The Must-Haves • Background: Entry-level contributor applying conceptual knowledge of theories, practices, and procedures within a discipline. Bachelor’s degree in a related field preferred. • Experience: 0-2 years’ relevant experience OR equivalent combination of education and experience. • Skills: Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite products, excellent communication, problem-solving, and organizational skills, able to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively, high level of integrity and discretion in handling sensitive and confidential data. • Bonus: SAP experience preferred.

results.title: Christiaan Skelly
highlights:
Automation Engineer at [Mohawk Industries](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mohawk-industries)
...
#### Automation Engineer (Current)
...
Role Summary Automation Engineer responsible for designing, deploying, and sustaining AI-driven machine vision systems in live production environments. Owns system reliability, code updates, data pipelines, and edge deployment of AI models to ensure continuous integration between vision systems and manufacturing operations. Major Duties Develop, maintain, and support production-grade automation and AI vision codebases used in real-time manufacturing environments. Ensure continuous communication and system integrity between AI vision systems, industrial cameras, databases, and production equipment. Convert, optimize, and deploy AI and deep learning models for execution on industrial smart cameras and edge devices. Maintain and manage databases used for inspection results, defect tracking, system diagnostics, and traceability. Monitor system performance and uptime, proactively troubleshooting software, connectivity, and data issues to prevent production disruptions. Implement controlled updates, validation, and version management to safely deploy changes to live automation systems. Collaborate with Quality, Manufacturing, and IT teams to align automation solutions with operational and business objectives. Key Achievements Successfully deployed and maintain a real-time AI vision inspection system operating on live production lines. Improved inspection consistency and response time by replacing manual inspection steps with automated AI-based defect detection. Enabled scalable deployment by converting trained AI models for edge execution directly on camera hardware, reducing latency and infrastructure complexity. Established reliable data logging and database infrastructure to support analytics, reporting, and continuous model improvement. Became the primary technical owner for vision automation systems, supporting ongoing enhancements and future expansion.
...
Work with the Matlab program to detect defects from tufting, dye continuous lines, and coater continuous lines. Train models to detect the defects that appear on the carpet. This program has saved the company $1.3 Million annually and savings are expected to increase.

Mohawk Industries (MHK) is a Textile Manufacturing company. Mohawk Industries, Inc. is a company that specializes in ceramic, residential carpet, commercial flooring, rugs, laminate, lvt, sheet vinyl, wood, countertops, panels, and insulation. They have a strong focus on environmental, social, and governance initiatives. The company is committed to sustainability and has a strong commitment to the environment. They have certifications and a data center. Mohawk Industries employs 3,410 people (+4.4% YoY, +550 people) and has an annual revenue of $10.8B. # Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)
...
- Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)
...
- We are looking for a highly skilled Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Generative AI) to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing, fine-tuning, and applying advanced generative AI models - including diffusion models, large language models (LLMs), and other state-of-the-art architectures. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional partners in research, data engineering, and operations to deliver high-quality machine learning solutions and scalable datasets.
...
- Design and Implement LLM-Driven Synthetic Data Pipelines: Design and build workflows using LLMs and Gen AI techniques to create high-volume, high-quality synthetic data for model training and testing.
...
- Design, implement, and deploy machine learning models with a focus on generative AI (diffusion models, LLMs, and related architectures)
...
- Fine-tune, evaluate, and optimize large language models for specific downstream tasks and data needs
...
- Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines supporting training, evaluation, and inference workflows
...
- Partner cross-functionally with researchers, engineers, and data program managers to define requirements and deliver high-impact ML solutions
...
- REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS:
...
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field from an accredited U.S. institution
- 2+ years of experience in Machine Learning or Software Engineering
- Expert-level proficiency in Python and familiarity with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
...
- Strong foundation in machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, and evaluation techniques
...
- Demonstrated experience working with diffusion models, stable diffusion, or large language models (LLMs)

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. highlights:
Senior Data Scientist, Platform | Wfhforgeon
...
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform
...
Posted Jun 23, 2026
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- A Typical Day:
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
Empowerment: Think strategically about how to scale and evolve Airbnb’s content integrity defenses, helping define the long-term vision for
...
- Your Expertise:
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge of causal inference
...
- Skilled in statistical programming (Python or R) and database usage (SQL)
